summary_oneline: GraphIndex — structured knowledge graph indexing unifying code, docs, and skills via pipeline-of-stages build with rustworkx + tree-sitter + FAISS + ArangoDB

localization.role: persistence backend for graph nodes and edges — consumed unchanged
tenant isolation primitives — extended with universal meta-ontology
tree builders consumed by loader-based extractor for hierarchical content
GRAPH_REPORT.md injection into agent system prompt
embedding infrastructure for Stage 2 (Embed) — replaces proposal's AbstractClient reference
new module — confirmed does not exist yet
agent-facing tools — follows existing toolkit pattern

corrections.claim: Proposal references TenantContext.ontology as type Ontology
corrections.impact: Code references in proposal and spec must use MergedOntology

corrections.claim: Proposal references Entity and Relation types
corrections.actual: Actual types are EntityDef and RelationDef
corrections.impact: All schema references must use EntityDef/RelationDef

corrections.claim: Proposal says parrot.clients.AbstractClient for embeddings and summaries
corrections.actual: AbstractClient has no embed() method. Embeddings use parrot.embeddings.EmbeddingModel. For summaries, use AbstractClient.ask() or .complete()
corrections.impact: Stage 2 (Embed) must use parrot.embeddings infrastructure. Summary/verification stages use AbstractClient.ask()

corrections.claim: Proposal says AbstractClient.ask exact signature needs verification
corrections.actual: ask(prompt, model, max_tokens, temperature, files?, system_prompt?, structured_output?, tools?, ...) -> MessageResponse
corrections.impact: Now verified — use ask() for LLM calls, complete() for simple text extraction

corrections.claim: TenantContext field set listed as 3 fields
corrections.actual: TenantContext has 4 fields: tenant_id, arango_db, pgvector_schema, ontology
corrections.impact: pgvector_schema field is useful — GraphIndex can use it for pgvector embedding storage

confirmations.claim: OntologyGraphStore has upsert_nodes, create_edges, get_all_nodes, soft_delete_nodes, execute_traversal, initialize_tenant
PageIndex public API matches: build_page_index, md_to_tree, PageIndexRetriever, etc.
KNOWLEDGE_LAYER at priority 30 with knowledge_content template
AbstractToolkit auto-discovers public async methods as tools
graphindex module does not exist — clean namespace
rustworkx, tree-sitter, tree-sitter-languages, pathspec NOT declared — new extra needed
ai-parrot-loaders has 24+ loaders covering all mentioned formats
Flowtask Component base class is in external flowtask package
40+ existing toolkits follow AbstractToolkit pattern in ai-parrot-tools

unknowns.question: What is the exact Flowtask Component base class interface and registration contract?
How should the LoaderBasedExtractor detect hierarchical vs flat content from a loader?
plausible_answers: Maintain a static mapping of loader type → hierarchical/flat
Probe the output for heading structure

recommended_next_command.rationale: The proposal is well-structured with high-confidence localization across all integration points. All critical code references verified against the live codebase. Five corrections identified but none are architectural — they are naming/import fixes. Ready for spec decomposition.
